title: Carmageddon TDR 2000
notes: Gives an error EXCEPTION Access Violation with some RAM entries

Must run the setup first which is a little buggy but works and must select Software rendering since DirectX 7 gives an error "No suitable rendering device was selected".
Multiplayer wasn't tested. Framerate is good with some occasional minor drops and stuttering. Audio crackles with some sound effects but generally sounds good.
